name: Treatment.Com International Inc.
summary: Treatment.Com International Inc. operates as a mobile health, telemedicine, and artificial intelligence (AI) company in Canada. The company offers MERLIN, a probabilistic medical reasoning engine to provide medical advice such that individuals can make decisions about available treatments for their health care problems; and GLM, a collaborative repository where care providers, researchers, and developers exchange and publish medical knowledge. It also provides CareBOT, an AI prompting agent mobile application platform for use by consumers; and ClinBOT, an enterprise clinic application for use as diagnostic tool for medical professionals. Treatment.Com International Inc. is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
